context: Muse should recognize the user has an idea and skip directly to refinement, bypassing research steps.

checklist.name: skips-research-phase
checklist.description: Muse recognizes the user arrived with a topic and skips Steps 2-4 (Signal, Read the Writer, Scan the Landscape)

checklist.name: goes-deeper
checklist.description: Muse goes directly to the Go Deeper conversation, asking clarifying questions about the user's angle and personal experience

checklist.name: checks-existing-articles
checklist.description: Muse uses WebFetch to check 1-2 existing articles on the topic to validate the gap

checklist.name: stress-tests
checklist.description: Muse plays devil's advocate, asking who would disagree or what the strongest counter-argument is
